title: Proof Pack 01 — mixed evidence states (fictional)
offenceWording: Section 4 Public Order Act 1986 — threatening behaviour
mainIssue: Attribution and served vs referred phone/BWV material on messy disclosure

must_not_say: statement confirms every factual detail without review

expected_handling.chase: none — served but still review for inconsistencies
expected_handling.court: may reference served statement with source anchor
expected_handling.client: plain English — complainant account served, not confirmed by you

expected_handling.chase: use index to chase missing exports
expected_handling.court: may ask court to note schedule gaps
expected_handling.client: explain some items listed but not yet received

expected_handling.chase: Please provide full UFED extraction, metadata, and search scope
expected_handling.court: do not treat screenshots as complete download
expected_handling.client: only partial phone material received — more may be outstanding

expected_handling.chase: Please provide full BWV export with continuity
expected_handling.court: may ask court to record BWV not served
expected_handling.client: video mentioned but not provided — cannot rely on it yet

expected_handling.chase: Please provide full custody record and PACE review
expected_handling.court: may ask court to record missing custody material

expected_handling.chase: chase underlying phone/BWV before relying on MG5 summary
expected_handling.court: treat as prosecution theory not proof
expected_handling.client: prosecution summary only — evidence still being chased

must_not_say: co-defendant denial proves Alex Quinn acted
bleed co-defendant account to client defendant

expected_handling.chase: do not chase as Alex Quinn material unless linked on papers
expected_handling.client: separate defendant material — do not discuss as Alex's account
